<p align="center">
  A simple, fast and colorful logging tool for Node.js applications.<br/>
  Clean logs, structured levels, and full customization support.

<hr/>

<h2 align="center">About</h2>

<p align="center">
  <b>inkfish</b> is a lightweight and flexible logging solution for Node.js applications,
  designed to improve readability, structure, and debugging efficiency.
</p>

<hr/>

<h2 align="center">Features</h2>

<ul>
  <li>🎯 Structured log levels (info, warn, error, success, debug, conn)</li>
  <li>⌛ Automatic timestamps and optional tags</li>
  <li>🎨 Fully customizable themes and icons</li>
  <li>🧩 Multiple output modes (compact, box, JSON)</li>
  <li>⚡ Lightweight and easy to integrate</li>
</ul>

<p align="center">
  <a href="https://github.com/nuneswip/surface-debug/tree/main/assets/preview/preview.md">
    View Preview
  </a>
</p>

<hr/>

<h2 align="center">Installation</h2>

```bash
# npm
npm install @nuneswip/inkfish

# yarn
yarn add @nuneswip/inkfish

# pnpm
pnpm add @nuneswip/inkfish
```

<hr/>
